characters.name: Farhad Abbasi
characters.description: Farhad AbbasiBasic informationAge60'sStatusAliveProfessionEmir ofKunamiPhysical descriptionGenderMaleHair colorWhiteEye colorBrownFirst appearanceLast appearance——Farhad Abbasiis the former Emir ofKunami. Abbasi is the dictatorial ruler of the Emirate ofKunami. He practises Shia Islam and is in charge of the ruling Shia minority within the country, which is majority Sunni. He arranged for a Kunami to collide with theUSS Verona (DDG-145)during a storm. This caused a diplomatic incident with the United States. The Emir hoped that he could use the ship and sailors as leverage to force the US to remove the sanctions on Kunami.

He was interviewed by PresidentTom Kirkmanas a candidate forVice President of the United Statesbut he fell out of favor because he seemed to crave the Presidency for himself.

characters.name: Jason Atwood
characters.description: Jason AtwoodPortrayed byMalik YobaBasic informationStatusDeceasedProfessionFBIDeputy Director(formerly)Physical descriptionGenderMaleHair colorBrownEye colorBrownFamily informationMarital StatusMarriedSpouseYvette AtwoodChildrenLuke Atwood(deceased)First appearanceLast appearancePilotBrace for ImpactJason Atwoodwas the former Deputy Director of the FBI. He initially aided his colleague,Hannah Wellsin her investigation into the Capitol bombing, until his son,Luke, was kidnapped and held hostage by anunknown female conspirator. Under instructions from her in order to ensure Luke's safety, he falsely confessed to the murder of theAl-Sakarleader,Majid Nassarand was imprisoned. He was released from custody, but he was fired. He began directly aiding Hannah in her investigation into the conspiracy once Luke's killer was identified. However, Jason was caught spying on top conspiratorsJay WhitakerandPatrick Lloydand was shot byNestor Lozano. Just moments after theCapitol exploded, Jason was presented by Hannah Wells with the theory that the perpetrators responsible did not claim credit because they were not finished with whatever they were doing. However, whenPresident Kirkmanasked him for any suspects, Jason stated that they primarily suspectedAl-Sakar. When Hannah confronted him for not telling the President about her theory, he replied that if she wanted him to, she had to prove it.[1] Jason did not get directly involved with Hannah's investigation until she showed him the existence of Room 105; a secret bomb shelter CongressmanPeter MacLeishwas hiding in during the attack. He went to report the discovery to President Kirkman, but due to MacLeish's sudden presence, he simply told that they were making progress.

characters.name: Luke Atwood
characters.description: Luke AtwoodBasic informationStatusDeceasedProfessionStudent (formerly)Physical descriptionGenderMaleHair colorBrownEye colorBrownFamily informationParentsJason AtwoodYvette AtwoodFirst appearanceLast appearanceThe TraitorThe End of the BeginningLuke Atwoodwas the son ofJason Atwood. He was kidnapped byBrooke Mathison, who forced his father to falsely confess to the murder ofMajid Nassarin return for Luke's safety. Unfortunately, she did not hold up her end of the bargain, and Luke's body was found near a river.

characters.name: Yvette Atwood
characters.description: Yvette Atwoodis the wife of former FBI directorJason Atwoodand mother of littleLuke Atwoodwho are both deceased.

He enters into a relationship withDontae Evans.

characters.name: Tim Beck
characters.description: Tim BeckPortrayed byMatthew MacFadzeanBasic informationFull nameTim BeckStatusAliveProfessionCIA OperativePhysical descriptionGenderMaleFirst appearanceLast appearanceThe TraitorLazarusTim Beckis a CIA Operative who occasionally meets with FBI AgentHannah Wellsto give her information, notably the file onNestor Lozanoand the report that claimed MacLeish's unit killed civilians. At first, Tim told Hannah to stay away from the conspiracy after telling a bit of information about Catalan, but reluctantly decided to help her, if possible. After being requested to look into the mission on November 14, 2005, Tim gave a report that contradicted the stories MacLeish and his unit had been telling the public. From that point, they both came to the conclusion that MacLeish was not a war hero, he was a war criminal.

characters.description: Sasha BookerPortrayed byJamie ClaytonBasic informationFull nameSasha BookerAgeMid 30StatusAlivePhysical descriptionGenderFemale (Transgender)Hair colorBlondEye colorGreenFamily informationMarital StatusSingleParentsEva Booker(Mother)SiblingsAlex KirkmanFirst appearanceLast appearance#PrivacyPlease#TruthOrConsequencesSasha BookerisAlex Kirkman's transgender sister. Before the events of season one, she moved to Paris. In season three, after being exposed by the media to hurt her brother in law's re-election bid, she moved into the residence of theWhite Houseto supportPenny Kirkman.

characters.name: Lyor Boone
characters.description: Lyor BoonePortrayed byPaulo CostanzoBasic informationFull nameLyor BooneAgeEarly 30sStatusAliveProfessionWhite House Political DirectorPhysical descriptionGenderMaleHair colorBrownEye colorHazelFamily informationMarital StatusMarriedChildrenNoneFirst appearanceLast appearanceOne Year InRun Lyor Boone Ms.C,Ph.D, is the current White House Political Director, hired byEmily Rhodesin 2016.[1]He is portrayed byPaulo Costanzo. A highly intelligent but socially inept genius, Lyor is brought into the White House to coordinate a political 'battle-strategy' for President Kirkman going forward. Though he comes off as boorish, insensitive, rude and somewhat odd and disconnected to strangers and his colleagues alike, Lyor is nonetheless a highly accomplished and effective operator who has helped the White House fend off a number of potentially devastating incidents. Lyor is a blunt, sarcastic, acerbic and calculating individual with a razor sharp wit and a deadpan sense of humor. He is not afraid of speaking truth to power and is always quick to point out the shortcomings of others especially when making a point. His extremely high intellect allows him to verbally spar with virtually anyone for as long as he likes, demonstrating a honed ability to think on his feet and formulate arguments very effectively. He is somewhat lax about recognizing when he is exasperating those around him or when his actions come across as strange, unnecessary or even counterproductive and therefore surprised whenever someone points this out to him. As an operator of the White House, Lyor is both frowned on and admired by his colleagues for his brutal honesty, his unusual work-habits, lack of social skills and his strange workplace preferences. Lyor however more than makes up for this by coming up with ingenious solutions to various problems, his dedication to his job, his loyalty to the administration and his exemplary work-ethic. As PD, Lyor's perpetual first priority is safeguarding the President and enacting initiatives to shore up his poll numbers and defend him against criticism. At the same time he is not shy about pointing out the failings of the administration and how much damage they cause. Lyor is a self-proclaimed agnostic (one who is open to the existence of God) but is harshly critical of those who espouse religion as a law to be followed without exception; he once advocated declaring a Christian sect collectively insane because they wouldn't move out of the path of a wildfire unless the baby daughter of one of their members, whom the government had taken custody of, was denied life-saving heart surgery in favor of prayer.

characters.name: Gregory Bowen
characters.description: Gregory BowenPortrayed byDan JeannotteBasic informationFull nameGregory BowenStatusAlivePhysical descriptionGenderMaleFirst appearanceLast appearanceSummitOverkillGregory Bowenis a British political advisor andLyor Boone's professional rival. Bowen used to work with Lyor on Governor Hammond’s election campaign. When it became clear that Governor Hammond was going to lose the election, Greg bailed on the campaign and blamed Lyor for the campaign’s failure to save his own reputation. At a later time, Bowen became a political advisor toEast Hun ChiuChairmanKyung Kim. He conspired withAmbassador Salimito orchestrate theD.C. Metro Bombingin a to instal Salimi as the new Emir ofKunami. After the true nature of the plot was uncovered, Bowen was arrested and signed a confession implicating Ambassador Salimi andAmal Hamzi.

characters.name: Jack Bowman
characters.description: Jack BowmanPortrayed byMark DeklinBasic informationFull nameJack BowmanStatusAliveProfessionU.S. SenatorChairman of the Senate Appropriations CommitteeGovernor of Montana (formerly)Politcal partyRepublicanPhysical descriptionGenderMaleHair colorBlackEye colorGreenFirst appearanceLast appearanceOne Hundred DaysBrace for ImpactJack Bowmanis a Republican Senator from the State of Montana, the Chairman of the Senate Appropriations Committee. He was the Governor of Montana, but he resigned after theCapitol Bombingso his successor could appoint him to the United States Senate. During the events of the series, he continuously opposesTom Kirkman's ideals. Before theCapitol Bombing, Jack Bowman was the Republican governor of Montana. He is a staunch conservative who especially has pro-gun views. These views most likely come from being the governor of a conservative, rural state like Montana. After the Capitol Bombing, he resigned his position as governor in order to be appointed as a senator by his successor. This move was seen by many as a prelude to a presidential run and he quickly established himself as an opponent of PresidentThomas Kirkman. With a Republican majority in the Senate, Bowman was hoping to implement an effective counter-power to Kirkman's efforts, especially with the House of Representatives divide between Republicans, Democrats and a third of new Independent congressmen.

characters.name: Winslow Brimmer
characters.description: Winslow BrimmerPortrayed byHoward HooverBasic informationFull nameWinslow BrimmerStatusAliveProfessionGovernor of TexasPolitcal partyRepublican (Most Likely)Physical descriptionGenderMaleFirst appearanceLast appearance#scaredsh*tless—Winslow Brimmeris the Governor of Texas. WhenWouter Mombergplanned to carry out a bioterror attack against people of color in Texas PresidentKirkmanreached out to officials in the state to coordinate a response. Kirkman asked the Governor to handle the matter covertly to prevent public panic and avoid alerting Momberg. Brimmeri undermined Kirkman by causing a panic in the press and deferring toCornelius Mossleadership.

characters.name: Phil Brunton
characters.description: Phil BruntonPortrayed byAaron AshmoreBasic informationFull namePhil BruntonStatusAliveProfessionMoss2020 Presidential Campaign Chief Domestic Strategist(formerly)Physical descriptionGenderMaleHair colorBrownFamily informationMarital StatusMarriedFirst appearanceLast appearance#whocares#undecidedPhil Bruntonwas the Chief Domestic Strategist forCornelius Moss' 2020 Presidential Campaign. Brunton was one of the masterminds behind the bioterror scheme against people of color. He was a far-right nationalist who hoped that the mass sterilization of people of color would lead to a change in voter demographics that would favor his conservative beliefs.

characters.name: Margaret Clay
characters.description: Margaret ClayPortrayed byTonjha RichardsonBasic informationFull nameMargaret ClayAge50'sProfessionSpeaker of the United States House of RepresentativesPhysical descriptionGenderFemaleHair colorBlackEye colorBrownFamily informationMarital StatusN/ASpouseN/AFirst appearanceLast appearancescaredsh*tless—Margaret Clayis an American politician currently serving as theSpeaker of the House. Clay is introduced in the Season 3 episode#scaredsh*tless, as part of the congressional leadership "Gang of Eight" who Chief of StaffMars Harperinforms about the bioterrorism threat posed byWouter Momberg. It is unknown how long she has served in her position as Speaker of the House or whom she succeeded.  In the Season 2 episodeIn the DarkPresident Kirkman was discussingEllenor Darby'sappointment to Vice President with a male speaker of the house. This means that there was at least one speaker betweenKimble Hookstratenand Clay.

characters.name: Harris Cochrane
characters.description: Harris CochranePortrayed byKevin R. McNallyBasic informationStatusAliveProfessionU.S. Army General (Formerly)Chairman of the Joint Chiefs(Formerly)NORDCOM leader (formerly)Physical descriptionGenderMaleHair colorGrayEye colorBrownFirst appearanceLast appearancePilotBrace for Impact Harris Cochraneis a United States Army General, previously serving as the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, before being fired byTom Kirkmanafter disregarding a direct order. In TheOathwe learn that he served, 2 1/2 years before the attack on the Capital, as head of NORCOM. He informed the president that the file had been removed from his computer by the Secretary of Defense.

characters.description: Senator CowlingPortrayed byRochelle AytesBasic informationFull nameCowlingStatusAliveProfessionU.S. SenatorPhysical descriptionGenderFemaleFirst appearanceLast appearanceSting of the TailKirkman AgonistesSenatorCowlingis a prominent United States Senator. Cowling is a high-ranking member of the Senate Homeland Security Committee, Senate Foreign Relations Committee, and Senate Energy Subcommittee. Cowling is a powerful figure onCapitol Hilland theKirkmanadministration frequently consults her when making decisions.

characters.name: Senator Crowl
characters.description: Senator CrowlPortrayed byJessica TuckBasic informationStatusAliveProfessionU.S. SenatorPhysical descriptionGenderFemaleFirst appearanceLast appearanceTargetRunSenator Crowlis a Democratic Senator. At first, she tries to get PresidentTom Kirkmanto run in the2020 United States presidential electionas a Democrat. When Kirkman refuses she teams up with her Republican counterpoint to sabotage Kirkman as a candidate.

characters.name: Ellenor Darby
characters.description: Ellenor DarbyPortrayed byAunjanue EllisBasic informationStatusAliveProfessionVice President of the United States(formerly)Mayor of Washington D.C.(formerly)Politcal partyDemocraticPhysical descriptionGenderFemaleHair colorBlackEye colorBrownFirst appearanceLast appearanceIn the Dark#thesystemisbrokenEllenor Darbyis the formerVice President of the United Statesand former Mayor of Washington D.C. After PresidentTom Kirkmanengages in a scathing rant to Congress during the State of the Union address, Darby announces she has become disillusioned with the administration. She mentions she feels considerably sidelined, especially as all of the suggestions her office made for the State of the Union address were ignored. Informing Kirkman she intends to place her name for consideration for theDemocratic Party's nominee in the2020 United States presidential election, she resigns from the Vice Presidency. Darby lost the primary election for the Democratic Party's presidential nominee to businessmanWilliam Porter.

characters.name: Ellenor Darby
characters.description: Ellenor DarbyPortrayed byAunjanue EllisBasic informationStatusAliveProfessionVice President of the United States(formerly)Mayor of Washington D.C.(formerly)Politcal partyDemocraticPhysical descriptionGenderFemaleHair colorBlackEye colorBrownFirst appearanceLast appearanceIn the Dark#thesystemisbrokenEllenor Darbyis the formerVice President of the United Statesand former Mayor of Washington D.C. After PresidentTom Kirkmanengages in a scathing rant to Congress during the State of the Union address, Darby announces she has become disillusioned with the administration. She mentions she feels considerably sidelined, especially as all of the suggestions her office made for the State of the Union address were ignored. Informing Kirkman she intends to place her name for consideration for theDemocratic Party's nominee in the2020 United States presidential election, she resigns from the Vice Presidency. Darby lost the primary election for the Democratic Party's presidential nominee to businessmanWilliam Porter.

She previously worked as the Counsel to a Senate Homeland security sub-committee. At the end of Season 2, Daynes started a relationship with President Kirkman's brotherTrey Kirkman.

characters.name: Garrett Detwiler
characters.description: Garrett DetwilerPortrayed byRob StewartBasic informationFull nameGarrett DetwilerStatusAliveProfessionPharmaceutical ExecutiveChairman of the Board of FlagKind(formerly)FDA Commissioner(formerly)Physical descriptionGenderMaleFirst appearanceLast appearance#makehistory#undecidedGarrett Detwileris a pharmaceutical executive who served as the Chairman of the Board of FlagKind. Detwiler served as FDA Commissioner in PresidentCornelius Moss' Administration. He used his position as Commissioner of the FDA Commissioner to rubberstamp a FlagKind drug despite knowing that it with highly addictive. When Cornelius Moss ran for president in 2020 Detwiler became the biggest financial benefactor to his campaign. Detwiler was the main source of funding for the bioterror scheme against people of color.Mars Harperleaked information about Detwiler’s time at the FDA to reporters which led to him receiving negative press and having to step down from multiple companies boards. He was later arrested after being exposed as the conspirator who funded the bioterror threat.

characters.name: Walter Dunlap
characters.description: Walter DunlapPortrayed byPatrick GalliganBasic informationStatusAliveProfessionU.S. SenatorPhysical descriptionGenderMaleHair colorGrayEye colorHazelFirst appearanceLast appearanceParty Lines—SenatorWalter Dunlapis a Republican Senator from Iowa. He describes himself as leaning toward the center,[1]and also voted for SB 8180, which strengthens federal background checks. Dunlap was appointed to the Senate by the Governor of Iowa. Like President Kirkman, Dunlap went to Cornell University in Ithaca, New York. In a conversation with Kirkman in the Oval Office, they reminisced about their younger years, while eating a Pinesburger, a local delicacy from Ithaca.

characters.name: Dontae Evans
characters.description: Dontae EvansPortrayed byBenjamin Charles WatsonBasic informationStatusAliveProfessionKirkman 2020 Presidential Campaign stafferWhite House Digital Officer(formerly)White House communications staffer(formerly)Physical descriptionGenderMaleHair colorBlackFamily informationMarital StatusSingleFirst appearanceLast appearance#thesystemisbroken#truthorconsequencesDontae Evansis a White House staffer who worked for the office of online engagement. If responsible for creating #KirkmanListens which energized citizens who felt forgotten. He briefly worked forSeth Wrightin the White House communication office before transferring to the Kirkman campaign. Despite working in political jobs; Dontae is skeptical that politicians will keep their promises or enact change which has led to a history of abstaining from voting. He begins to change his beliefs about politics after meeting Present Kirkman. He entered into a relationship with Secret Service agentTroy Baye.
